creator: yklaxds@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Now, it is possible to compile the rustdesk-server on the aarch64 architecture. I tested it on a Raspberry Pi 5 using FreeBSD-15.0.

If possible, I hope the maintainer can remove the "BROKEN_aarch64=	fails to build" label. Thank you very much for your work.

Thanks.

------------------
root@ykla:~ # /usr/local/bin/hbbr -V
hbbr 1.1.11-1
root@ykla:~ # /usr/local/bin/hbbs -V
hbbs 1.1.11-1
root@ykla:~ # uname -a
FreeBSD ykla 15.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT main-n271593-d8a16b6a4c44 GENERIC arm64
-------------
